arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Everton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal welcome Everton to the Emirates this weekend as Mikel Arteta takes on his former team. The Gunners are unbeaten since returning from November’s international break and head into the clash after a comfortable Champions League win over AS Monaco. arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Everton – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal welcome Everton to North London this weekend as they look to make it eight unbeaten in all competitions. Mikel Arteta’s side eased past Monaco in a 3-0 victory in the Champions League during midweek, which puts them in a favourable for qualification to the knockout stages. arts.ttl: Lookman to Arsenal? Nigeria teammate CONFIRMS interest
arts.sum: Nigeria captain William Troost-Ekong has confirmed that 'big clubs' have been keen on Ademola Lookman since his hattrick in the Europa League final. According to Nigeria captain William Troost-Ekong, the speculation surrounding Lookman's future is well-founded as he indeed has high-profile suitors, though he refrained from explicitly mentioning Arsenal .

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs Everton - TV channel, live stream details and kick-off time - football.london
arts.sum: Arsenal's home game with Everton is due to kick-off at 3pm on Saturday, December 14 at the Emirates Stadium. The North Londoners are in action this weekend at the same time as Arne Slot's men this weekend with Man City facing Man United on Sunday and Chelsea hosting Brentford later in the day.

arts.ttl: Arsenal two games away from nightmare Premier League scenario over Christmas
arts.sum: Jorginho, Rice, Saka and Timber are less of an immediate concern but if they pick up another two yellow cards in the Premier League, they shall also face a one-game suspension. Jesus is the immediate concern for Arsenal as he sits on four cautions in the Premier League this season.
